description: Per-class examples. Not a global trust score. Not behavioral certification.

claims.statement: Signature over challenge nonce verifies under key K

claims.maxConclusion: Attested runtime label only unless platform root present

claims.statement: Audit entry E is included under Merkle root R
claims.maxConclusion: E is in the tree committed by R

claims.statement: All tool calls in interval I hit the dispatcher boundary
claims.maxConclusion: Justified only with trusted boundary or external observation
claims.note: Self-asserted chainIntact must not reach HIGH trust for completeness

claims.statement: Agent complied with Law 1 in incident X
claims.maxConclusion: Contextual interpretive judgment subject to dispute
